description: The Porsche Cayman, produced since 2005, is the fixed-roof sibling to the Boxster. Its perfect mid-engined balance and increasingly powerful engines have made it one of the best sports cars at any price. The 718 Cayman GT4 RS with its 4.0-litre flat-six from the 911 GT3 and 493 bhp is the pinnacle.
